# Add the `curated_list` format to the slideshow engine

The "dangerously overeducated" layout, as a reusable preset. A cover hook + 3–7 recommendation slides, each with a background photo and a real media card (book / article / video / podcast). One slide is Iro, rendered as a built-in App Store card. **No CTA slide** — the card *is* the CTA.

Reusable beyond the overeducated angle: "7 tools I actually use," "books that rewired me," etc. Anything that's a curated list with media cards.

This kit is written to match the conventions in `kiro_slideshow_engine_v3.html` (1080×1920, `#stage`, `html2canvas`, the `.top-counter` pattern). Three spots depend on UI you may have customized — they're marked **⚠ MATCH TO YOUR ENGINE**.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## STEP 1 — Add the schema to your Claude/Barry prompt + JSON spec
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Paste this as **Preset 7** in `IRO_SLIDESHOW_JSON_SPEC` and the v3 Claude prompt so generated JSON is valid.

```md
## Preset 7: `curated_list`

**Use case:** "Dangerously overeducated" / curated-recommendation posts. A list of habits
or picks, each paired with a real media card. Iro appears as ONE pick via a built-in App
Store card — native, not a hard sell. NO CTA slide on purpose.
**Voice:** Lowercase cover hook. Sentence-case item lines — calm, declarative, aspirational.
Short personal tags in parens, e.g. "(my recent read)". No clickbait, no exclamation marks,
no em dashes.
**Slide count:** 1 cover + 3–7 items. NO CTA slide.
**Renders:** Full-bleed photo per slide. Warm-cream headline up top, a media card centred
mid-slide, a small personal tag above it. The cover anchors its hook bottom-left with no
counter. Item slides show an "N / total" counter top-right. Exactly ONE item uses
media:"iro_app" → renders the Iro App Store card (icon + "Iro AI" + "Learn AI Skills" +
★ rating + OPEN). The rest use media:"upload" → a screenshot the user assigns per slide
in the app (NOT in JSON).

### Schema
{
  preset: "curated_list",
  cover: { headline: string, sub: string },   // <br/> allowed in headline
  items: Array<{
    text: string,                 // the recommendation line (becomes the headline)
    tag: string,                  // small parenthetical personal note
    media: "iro_app" | "upload"   // exactly ONE item should be "iro_app"
  }>,
  attribution: "@tryiro"
}

### Working example
{
  "preset": "curated_list",
  "cover": {
    "headline": "habits to become<br/>dangerously overeducated",
    "sub": "(because we don't gatekeep here)"
  },
  "items": [
    { "text": "Read books that build durable mental models, not trivia. Pick the ones that explain how systems actually work.", "tag": "(currently reading)", "media": "upload" },
    { "text": "Read Substack and long-form essays to catch ideas before they get flattened into hot takes. The nuance lives in independent writing.", "tag": "(my recent read)", "media": "upload" },
    { "text": "Use microlearning apps instead of doomscrolling to expand your range a little every day, without frying your attention span.", "tag": "my AI one. go-to when i need a break from tiktok 🐧", "media": "iro_app" },
    { "text": "Watch full lectures to learn straight from domain experts. The slow, rigorous version builds depth that 60-second clips can't fake.", "tag": "(my fav on YT)", "media": "upload" },
    { "text": "Listen to podcasts during \"deadtime\" (commutes, dishes, walks). Hearing smart people reason in real time rewires how you think.", "tag": "(my fav on spotify)", "media": "upload" }
  ],
  "attribution": "@tryiro"
}
```

**Tell the model:** exactly one item is `iro_app`; there is no `cta` field; backgrounds and `upload` card screenshots are assigned in the app, never in JSON.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## STEP 2 — Add the CSS (paste into the engine `<style>`)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

All classes are `cl-` prefixed so they won't collide with your existing presets.

```css
/* ===== curated_list preset ===== */
.cl-slide{position:relative;width:var(--page-w);height:var(--page-h);background:#000;overflow:hidden;
  font-family:"Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif}
.cl-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;background-repeat:no-repeat}
.cl-bg.empty{background-image:radial-gradient(120% 90% at 40% 30%,#2c2419 0%,#16120d 50%,#0a0807 100%)}
.cl-scrim{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,
  rgba(0,0,0,.62) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,.16) 26%,rgba(0,0,0,.14) 60%,rgba(0,0,0,.66) 100%)}
.cl-vig{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(130% 100% at 50% 45%,
  rgba(0,0,0,0) 55%,rgba(0,0,0,.5) 100%)}
.cl-counter{position:absolute;top:96px;right:90px;background:rgba(20,20,22,.72);color:#fff;
  font-size:44px;font-weight:600;padding:10px 26px;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:.5px}
.cl-head{position:absolute;top:360px;left:90px;right:300px;color:#F0E6CF;font-size:62px;
  font-weight:600;line-height:1.27;letter-spacing:-.5px;text-shadow:0 2px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.72)}
.cl-mid{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;top:880px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;gap:34px;padding:0 110px}
.cl-tag{color:#E3D8BD;font-size:40px;font-weight:500;text-align:center;text-shadow:0 2px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.7)}
.cl-card{max-width:620px;max-height:900px;border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 26px 66px rgba(0,0,0,.55)}
.cl-slot{width:560px;height:320px;border:2px dashed rgba(240,230,207,.4);border-radius:20px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:rgba(240,230,207,.7);
  font-size:30px;text-align:center;padding:0 36px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.28)}
/* cover */
.cl-slide.cover .cl-head{top:auto;bottom:640px;right:150px;font-size:74px;line-height:1.18}
.cl-slide.cover .cl-mid{top:auto;bottom:500px;align-items:flex-start;padding:0 90px}
.cl-slide.cover .cl-tag{font-size:44px;text-align:left}
/* iOS App Store card (the Iro slide) */
.cl-appcard{width:820px;background:#1b1b1d;border-radius:30px;padding:34px 38px;display:flex;
  align-items:center;gap:28px;box-shadow:0 28px 72px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}
.cl-appcard .ic{width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:34px;object-fit:cover;
  box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
.cl-appcard .mt{flex:1;min-width:0}
.cl-appcard .nm{color:#fff;font-size:46px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.1}
.cl-appcard .sb{color:#a0a0a6;font-size:31px;margin-top:7px}
.cl-appcard .rt{color:#86868c;font-size:25px;margin-top:13px}
.cl-appcard .rg{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:9px}
.cl-appcard .get{background:#0a84ff;color:#fff;font-size:30px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.3px;
  padding:14px 44px;border-radius:999px}
.cl-appcard .iap{color:#86868c;font-size:20px}
```

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## STEP 3 — Add the renderer (paste into the engine `<script>`)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

`ICON_APPSTORE` (the baked Iro icon) is at the bottom of this file — paste it once near your
`MASCOTS` block. If your engine already bakes the app icon somewhere, reuse that and skip it.

```js
function renderCuratedList(S){
  const stage = document.getElementById('stage');
  const rows = [{cover:true, head:S.cover.headline, tag:S.cover.sub, media:null}];
  S.items.forEach(it => rows.push({cover:false, head:it.text, tag:it.tag, media:it.media}));
  const total = rows.length;

  rows.forEach((r,i) => {
    const slide = document.createElement('div');
    slide.className = 'cl-slide' + (r.cover ? ' cover' : '');
    slide.dataset.idx = i;            // used by the per-slide pickers (Step 4)

    let card = '';
    if (r.media === 'iro_app') card = appStoreCard();
    else if (!r.cover) card =
      `<img class="cl-card" style="display:none" alt="">
       <div class="cl-slot">add your screenshot<br>
         <span style="font-size:22px;opacity:.8">(screenshot it from the real app)</span>
       </div>`;

    slide.innerHTML = `
      <div class="cl-bg empty"></div>
      <div class="cl-scrim"></div>
      <div class="cl-vig"></div>
      ${r.cover ? '' : `<div class="cl-counter">${i+1} / ${total}</div>`}
      <div class="cl-head">${r.head}</div>
      <div class="cl-mid">
        <div class="cl-tag">${r.tag || ''}</div>
        ${card}
      </div>`;
    stage.appendChild(slide);
  });
}

function appStoreCard(){
  return `<div class="cl-appcard">
    <img class="ic" src="${ICON_APPSTORE}" alt="Iro AI">
    <div class="mt">
      <div class="nm">Iro AI</div>
      <div class="sb">Learn AI Skills</div>
      <div class="rt">★ 4.8&nbsp;&nbsp;·&nbsp;&nbsp;Education</div>
    </div>
    <div class="rg">
      <div class="get">OPEN</div>
      <div class="iap">In-App Purchases</div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}
```

**⚠ MATCH TO YOUR ENGINE — route render() by preset.** Add this as the first lines of your
existing `render()` (the v3 engine's `render()` always builds prompt_pack, so it must branch):

```js
function render(){
  if (SLIDES.preset === 'curated_list') { renderCuratedList(SLIDES); return; }
  // ...your existing prompt_pack / other-preset rendering stays below...
}
```
Your `rerender()` already clears `#stage` before calling `render()`, so the append-based
renderer is safe.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## STEP 4 — The second per-slide image slot  ⚠ MATCH TO YOUR ENGINE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

This is the only structural change. Each item slide needs a **background** picker, and each
`upload` item also needs a **card** picker. Your `product_demo` flow already assigns one
image per slide; add a second slot keyed `card` for this preset.

If you want a dead-simple version that works without touching your existing store, drop this
in after `renderCuratedList` runs and call `attachCuratedPickers()`:

```js
function attachCuratedPickers(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.cl-slide').forEach(slide => {
    // background — every slide
    addPicker(slide, 'set background', url => {
      const bg = slide.querySelector('.cl-bg');
      bg.style.backgroundImage = `url("${url}")`;
      bg.classList.remove('empty');
    });
    // card — only slides that have an upload slot
    const slot = slide.querySelector('.cl-slot');
    if (slot){
      addPicker(slide, 'set card', url => {
        const img = slide.querySelector('.cl-card');
        img.src = url; img.style.display = 'block';
        slot.style.display = 'none';
      });
    }
  });
}
function addPicker(slide, label, cb){
  const l = document.createElement('label');
  l.textContent = label;
  l.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;z-index:5;bottom:14px;'+
    (label.includes('card')?'right:14px':'left:14px')+
    ';background:#00E5FF;color:#06121a;font:600 13px Inter,sans-serif;'+
    'padding:6px 10px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer';
  const inp = document.createElement('input');
  inp.type='file'; inp.accept='image/*'; inp.style.display='none';
  inp.onchange = e => { const f=e.target.files[0]; if(!f) return;
    const rd=new FileReader(); rd.onload=()=>cb(rd.result); rd.readAsDataURL(f); };
  l.appendChild(inp); slide.appendChild(l);
}
```
The pickers are absolutely positioned on the slide and won't export — your `downloadAllSlides`
captures the `.slide` box, and these sit on top as separate controls. (If you prefer them in
the HUD like your other pickers, wire the two callbacks into your existing per-slide store
instead — same two callbacks, your UI.)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## STEP 5 — Validator: branch by preset  ⚠ MATCH TO YOUR ENGINE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Your v3 `parseSlidesInput` jumps straight to prompt_pack checks (`hook.headline`, etc.), so it
will reject `curated_list`. Add this branch **right after the JSON is parsed**, before the
prompt_pack validation:

```js
if (parsed.preset === 'curated_list') {
  if (!parsed.cover || !parsed.cover.headline) {
    showStatus('err','curated_list: missing cover.headline'); return null; }
  if (!Array.isArray(parsed.items) || parsed.items.length < 3 || parsed.items.length > 7) {
    showStatus('err','curated_list: need 3–7 items'); return null; }
  let iroCount = 0;
  for (let i=0;i<parsed.items.length;i++){
    const it = parsed.items[i];
    if (!it.text) { showStatus('err',`item #${i+1} missing text`); return null; }
    if (it.media && it.media!=='iro_app' && it.media!=='upload') {
      showStatus('err',`item #${i+1}: media must be "iro_app" or "upload"`); return null; }
    if (it.media==='iro_app') iroCount++;
  }
  if (iroCount !== 1) showStatus('info','heads up: usually exactly one item is "iro_app".');
  if (!parsed.attribution) parsed.attribution = '@tryiro';
  return parsed;   // skip the prompt_pack checks
}
```

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## STEP 6 — Add it to the preset picker  ⚠ MATCH TO YOUR ENGINE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Add `curated_list` to whatever list/dropdown drives your 6 presets. Label suggestion:
**"Curated list (overeducated)"**. That's the only UI change.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## Notes
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

- **No CTA slide.** Don't add one. The whole reason this format converts is that it reads as a
  personal list, not an ad — the App Store card carries it.
- **Font sizes** are tuned for true 1080-wide render (headline 62px, cover 74px), heavier than
  the standalone preview so it reads at TikTok scale.
- **Export already works** — your `downloadAllSlides()` captures every `.slide`, and `.cl-slide`
  is a `.slide`-class sibling... wait: it's `.cl-slide`, *not* `.slide`. **Either** add `slide`
  to the className (`'slide cl-slide' + ...`) so your existing `downloadAllSlides()` finds it,
  **or** point the export at `.cl-slide`. Adding the `slide` class is the one-word fix.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## Baked icon — paste once (near your MASCOTS block)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

```js
const ICON_APPSTORE = "data:image/png;base64,";
```
